cit.basis: Corporate profits tax (nalog na pribyl) standard rate RAISED from 20% to 25% effective 1 January 2025 (Federal Law No. 176-FZ of 12 July 2024). Comprises federal 8% (2025-2030) and regional 17%.

special_rates.it_companies_note: Accredited IT companies taxed at 5% for 2025-2030 (previously 0% for 2022-2024).

cit.note: Administered by the Federal Tax Service (FTS). Regional reductions and special economic zone regimes may apply.

vat.note: Standard VAT (NDS) rate 20%; 10% for certain food, medicines, and children's goods; 0% on exports. A simplified-regime (USN) VAT tier applies from 2025 for larger simplified taxpayers.

wht.note: Withholding on Russia-sourced income of non-residents; treaty relief is affected by suspended/denounced double-tax treaties since 2023.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive PIT scale introduced from 2025 (13% up to RUB 2.4m, rising to 22% above RUB 50m).

sources.name: Federal Tax Service of Russia (Federalnaya nalogovaya sluzhba)

metadata.caveat: AI-ESTIMATED: These rates and thresholds were generated by an AI model and have NOT been verified against primary legislation. Verify every figure against the Federal Tax Service of Russia (https://www.nalog.gov.ru/) and a qualified advisor before any filing or production use.
metadata.sanctions_note: International sanctions imposed on the Russian Federation since 2022 may materially affect the applicability, enforceability, and practical usability of these figures — especially for non-resident parties, cross-border payments, and treaty relief. Assess sanctions compliance before any reliance.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year reflecting the 1 Jan 2025 rate increase; transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified AI estimates for LedgerField.
Regional reductions, SEZ regimes, WHT, and sanctions effects may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.

official_sources.name: Federal Tax Service of Russia (Federalnaya nalogovaya sluzhba)
